role_title: Strategy and Operations Manager, Revenue Operations

location.office_time_required: within commuting distance of hub; in-person time valued for planning, problem-solving, and connection

level_signals: Title is 'Manager' but no people management mentioned
Requires past experience in consulting, finance, or strategy at high-growth startup
Expected to operate independently and lead strategic projects

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Past experience in consulting of finance and/or past experience in strategy, business operations or analytics at a high growth start-up
Strong strategic sense with the ability to balance data driven insights and business instincts
Exceptionally analytical with the ability to develop high level insights while not being afraid to get down and dirty with the data
Excellent executive communication skills. You can show and explain insights to a variety of audience types
Excellent data skills including strength with SQL and excel
Experience supporting the post sales motion of a GTM org
You have been a top performer wherever you have worked
Comfort working exceptionally fast in an ambiguous work environment
Ability to operate independently and go deep on projects while also building key cross collaborative relationships across the company

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working on a marketplace or a two-sided platform
Passion for creator communities, existing product categories on Whatnot, and/or new verticals that are uniquely suited for live e-commerce
Experience buying and selling in online marketplaces communities

scope.surface: Revenue Operations team supporting Sales and Post Sales GTM teams for seller base growth and partnerships
core_responsibilities: Work closely with the data team on reporting and analyzing performance data and recommend course corrections as needed
Take on key strategic and operational special projects that move the business forward and help us scale
Work with the post sales GTM team to build and develop playbooks and documentation
Support GTM leaders in identifying and presenting data and insights
Support category team with analysis and success measurement of initiatives
Work closely with the GTM launch, category, and central ops functions to ensure smooth operation and clear division of responsibility
Understand the competitive landscape and develop strategies to grow Whatnot's market position
Analyze and understand the live selling and broader market to stay on top trends and inform our GTM strategy
Partner with the ops and product teams to ensure broad cross functional alignment and make sure our GTM efforts are set-up for success

green_flags: Named #1 Best Startup Employer in America by Forbes — strong employer brand signal
Largest livestream shopping platform in North America and Europe — clear market leader context
Remote co-located with hub flexibility in LA, SF, and NYC
Generous benefits package including 401k match, parental leave, childcare, family planning
Dogfooding budget included — signals product-first culture
Role has broad cross-functional scope with data, GTM, product, and ops exposure
red_flags: Title says 'Manager' but no people management scope described — seniority and leveling ambiguous
Requires commuting proximity to LA, SF, or NYC hubs — not fully remote despite 'remote co-located' framing
JD does not specify years of experience, making seniority bar unclear

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from role scope and responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description as two-sided marketplace)
compensation.equity_mentioned (no mention of equity in JD)
ambiguities: Role title includes 'Manager' but no direct reports or people management responsibilities are described — may be an IC role with a manager title common at startups.
JD describes team as 'remote co-located' but body requires commuting distance to LA, SF, or NYC — treated as hybrid.
No years of experience stated; consulting OR high-growth startup background accepted — seniority range is wide.
